text.title: test-self-healing-locators-audited Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for test-self-healing-locators-audited as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Healer falls back to "first interactive element with matching text" when role+name fails.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: That fallback heals a "Cancel" button onto a page where the team renamed Cancel to "Discard"; the original "Cancel" elsewhere on the page (a different action) gets the click and silent prod incidents follow.

failure-mode.description: "Auto-merge healer PRs" rule whitelists the bot for all PRs touching `tests/`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats the gate; a wrong heal slips through with the same opacity as silent in-place rewriting.
